TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Timur, title = Timur, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Timur} }

S.FORM: alang Timur ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 498 buwan, 1,728 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 1,640 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 88 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 80%, Rukay 9%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Timur hya' ga Tjailjaking. tay 'llaw na Timur hya' ga Tjavatjavang. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Timur ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 498 buwan, 1,728 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 1,640 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 88 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 80%, Rukay 9%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Timur hya' ga Tjailjaking. tay 'llaw na Timur hya' ga Tjavatjavang. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ timur ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu s~ɕantimon ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na timur ħjaʔ ɣa tjailjakiŋ. taj ʔllaw na timur ħjaʔ ɣa tja*atja*aŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
